title: podman machine ssh does not respect rootful for non default machines
body:
### Issue Description

If you create a podman machine with non default names and it is rootful podman machine ssh machine_name will log you as user not root

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. `podman machine reset`
2. `podman machine init --now --rootful mymachine`
3. `podman machine ssh mymachine`


### Describe the results you received

```
podman machine ssh m1
Connecting to vm m1. To close connection, use `~.` or `exit`
[user@JMAURY-WIN11 ~]$ id
uid=1000(user) gid=1000(user) groups=1000(user),10(wheel)
[user@JMAURY-WIN11 ~]$
```

### Describe the results you expected

Should be logged as root
